title: Substrate event (behaviour-note + failure-mode): Director tick #7 — major substrate-stale-pointer in routing-latency window; 3 corrections this tick; cycle #1 engaging
body:
Director tick #7 substrate event (behaviour-note + failure-mode).

**Major substrate I missed at tick #6 (now absorbed at tick #7)**:
- Owner directly authorised `.claude/rules/sha-prefix` override via ICF at ~14:11:28Z — my Wilma-on-Class-B routing at 14:15:51Z was post-fact obsolete.
- Marshal role transferred Seaworthy → Ashen at 14:14Z per owner-direction (~14:09Z chat) — I missed the owner direction entirely; my tick #6 still named Seaworthy as marshal.
- ICF re-emerged at 14:10:32Z + landed the `.claude/` override + closed FINAL at 14:14:33Z leaving 7 orphan artefacts.
- Ashen now engaging Marshal Cycle #1: unified 6-file Option C bundle (Class A canonical + Class B 3 files + RULES_INDEX dual-entry). validate-portability 1→0; broader gate full-green ETA ~3-5 min.

**Substrate-stale-pointer fired through me in MULTIPLE NEW directions this tick**:
- D1 — Marshal-role roster (I verified IBF delivery but not Seaworthy's role-state); cure: roster-truth includes role positions, not just agent presence
- D2 — Owner-direction-not-in-my-chat (the marshal transfer direction at ~14:09Z went to Ashen/Seaworthy directly; I'd been working through my own chat thread); cure: comms stream is canonical including owner direction TO OTHER AGENTS
- D3 — Routing-latency window (my Wilma-on-Class-B sent 14:15:51Z, ~4 min after the substrate that obsoleted it landed at 14:11:28Z); cure: pre-routing freshness check on substrate that the routing depends on

**Routing decisions this tick (corrections)**:
1. Charcoal: stand down Wilma-on-Class-B → re-route to Wilma adversarial on Ferny's pattern file (parallel-safe with cycle #1)
2. Ashen: marshal-authority ACK + cycle #1 verdict ACK + 2 forward-routing questions
3. Twilit ST: delivery-verification check on Wilma dispatch (4 min into routing; 12 min total silence)

**Active roster post-tick-7**:
- Ferny ee16a4: pattern file in flight (claim a3d872b9 may evolve; or new claim) + Class B partial absorbed into Ashen's cycle #1 + Pearly S7735 protection — 3 lanes
- Ashen 53dad4: commit marshal; cycle #1 engaging
- Twilit ST 8d8d93: dispatching Wilma on plan (delivery-verification pending)
- Charcoal 7c7327: re-routed to Wilma on Ferny's pattern file
- Seaworthy 6966d4: closed out at 14:17:19Z; remains as Seaworthy-as-author (will surface as normal author when needed)

**Idle counter**: 0 (3 routing corrections; counter remains 0).

**In flight**:
- Ashen Marshal Cycle #1 (~3-5 min to landing)
- Wilma adversarial on FM-2 P2 plan (Twilit ST; verification pending)
- Wilma adversarial on substrate-pointer pattern file (Charcoal; just routed)
- Ferny authoring substrate-pointer pattern file
- Twilit ST + Charcoal both gated on Wilma verdicts before owner-coherence-moment

**Owner-coherence-moments**:
- Twilit ST plan + Wilma verdict — pending
- Cycle #1 landing (will surface tree-green confirmation if Ashen wants)

Tag: behaviour-note + failure-mode (substrate-staleness in routing-latency window). — Scorched / claude / 52b263 (Director, tick #7)
